morning.greeting: Good morning! Pick 3 things for today.
morning.confirm: Your day is set. Start whenever you're ready.

engage.skipConfirm: No worries — it'll come back when the time is right.
engage.allDoneSubtitle: Anything else, or call it a win?

focus.title: Ready to focus?
focus.subtitle: Pick your time.
focus.start: Let's go. I'll keep the clock — you focus.

transition.heading: Nice work.
transition.subtitle: Take a moment.
transition.break: Take a break — I'll be here.

welcomeBack.sweepPrompt: A few things piled up. Quick 2-minute sweep?
welcomeBack.archived: Moved {count} old {count, plural, one {item} other {items}} out of your way.
welcomeBack.allCleared: All caught up! Nothing urgent is waiting.

capture.brainDumpPrompt: Feeling overwhelmed? Dump it all here.
capture.brainDumpDone: All out of your head and safe here. Breathe. 🧠→📱

streaks.brokenShort: New streak starts today. Your garden's ready.
streaks.brokenLong: Starting fresh! Your garden's ready to grow again.

review.prompt: Sunday check-in? 10 minutes, tops. Future you will be glad.

overdue.waiting: This has been waiting. Still relevant?

garden.title: Your Garden
garden.resting: Resting — comes back when you do.

step1.title: Clear Inbox
step1.question: Is your inbox empty?
step1.count: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} to process

step2.title: Stale Stuff
step2.question: Things that haven't moved in a while.
step2.inboxStale: {count, plural, one {# inbox item} other {# inbox items}} older than 7 days
step2.somedayStale: {count, plural, one {# someday item} other {# someday items}} not reviewed in 30+ days
step2.waitingStale: {count, plural, one {# waiting-for item needs} other {# waiting-for items need}} a follow-up

step3.title: Projects Check
step3.question: Any projects need a new next action?
step3.stuckCount: {count, plural, one {# project} other {# projects}} without a next action

step4.title: Next Week
step4.question: What are 1-3 things you want to focus on?

step5.title: Win of the Week
step5.question: What are you proud of this week?

evening.title: Evening Check-In
evening.subtitle: A minute to close the loop.
evening.captureHeading: Anything on your mind for tomorrow?
evening.closing: Good night. Everything's safe in the system. 🌙
